results.description: Baseline with original verbose v1.1.0 skill (180-line SKILL.md + 399-line references/schema-examples.md)
Compressed skill to ~60 lines with inline Product and FAQPage examples, removed references/schema-examples.md
Verification run confirming consistency of compressed skill

changes: Compressed SKILL.md from 180 lines (v1.1.0) to ~60 lines (v2.0.0)
Removed references/schema-examples.md (399 lines) — inlined only Product and FAQPage examples
Removed educational sections: Initial Assessment, Core Principles, Quick Reference, Validation and Testing, Task-Specific Questions, Related Skills
Added concise Rules section with critical pitfalls (enumeration URLs, number types, reviewCount vs ratingCount)
Added inline JSON-LD templates for Product and FAQPage schemas
